active_projects.completion_summary: Migrated 14 files in builder/, iterate/, and utils/ from direct z3 imports to z3_shim abstraction layer. All 262 builder tests, 207 iterate tests pass.
Migrated 5 bimodal theory files (semantic.py, operators.py, iterate.py, witness_constraints.py, witness_registry.py) from direct z3 imports to z3_shim. All 73 bimodal tests pass.
Migrated 8 files in logos subtheories (all 5 operator files, iterate.py, protocols.py, theory_lib/types.py) from direct z3 imports to z3_shim. All 221 logos tests pass.

Migrated 8 files (logos/semantic.py, syntactic/assignments.py, syntactic/sentence.py, syntactic/types.py, models/semantic.py, models/constraints.py, models/types.py, models/structure.py) from direct z3 imports to z3_shim.

Extended expressions.py with type predicates (is_bool, is_int, is_int_value, is_real, is_bv, is_quantifier, is_true, is_false), missing functions (Sum, Var, ArraySort, set_param, reset_params). Created types_runtime.py with runtime type refs (BoolRef, BitVecRef, ExprRef, FuncDeclRef, ModelRef, etc.) and SolverException wrapper.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of z3 imports across 181 files, identified 15-20 core pipeline files requiring modification, documented two-phase migration strategy using existing expressions.py and adapter layer
10-phase comprehensive migration plan to wire solver registry into core solving pipeline
Implementation summary for solver registry wiring into core pipeline

active_projects.completion_summary: Migrated core solving pipeline from direct z3 imports to solver abstraction layer across 26 files, enabling MODEL_CHECKER_SOLVER=cvc5 to route through CVC5 backend with lazy AtomSort initialization and unified context reset

plan.summary: 4-phase revised plan leveraging existing infrastructure. Reduced from 6 to 3-4 hours by reusing _find_max_N_static, try_single_N_static, serialize_semantic_theory, and switch_solver.

summary.summary: Implementation summary with verification results and usage examples

active_projects.completion_summary: Created scaling_benchmark.py that progressively scales model sizes to find z3 vs cvc5 performance divergence points. Script collects timing curves, calculates growth factors, and outputs JSON with per-example scaling results.
